nasb.text: We are ashamed because we have heard reproach; Disgrace has covered our faces, For aliens have entered The holy places of the Lord’s house.

esv.text: ‘We are put to shame, for we have heard reproach; dishonor has covered our face, for foreigners have come into the holy places of the Lord’s house.’

cnv.text: 我們因聽見辱罵而蒙羞， 滿面慚愧； 因為外族人進入了耶和華殿的聖所。

ccb.text: 你们说巴比伦人闯入了耶和华殿的圣所， 使你们蒙受耻辱，满面羞愧。
